cautions: Redfin is internally inconsistent on baths: the live listing header shows 2 bath(s), while Redfin public records show 1 bath(s).
LADBS PermitResultsbyPin page summary reported 1 permit(s), but the subject-address drilldown yielded 3 permit detail page(s).
Document-number searches for permit(s) 26030-10000-01235, 26014-10000-00017, 16041-10000-23545 returned no additional IDIS record docs.
Expanded LADBS assessor, address, and document-number searches did not surface any certificate-of-occupancy record.
Expanded LADBS searches converged on the following record doc(s): 16044-90000-05282, 1940LA04746.
LADBS records coverage is sparse relative to the permit set: 2 record doc(s) versus 3 permit detail page(s).
Prior developer buy price is not discoverable from the current live Redfin timeline.
No certificate-of-occupancy document or permit field was accessible in this live run.
